data.title: Fletcher Building Releases Director Shareholding Disclosures
data.description:
Fletcher Building Limited ( (FRCEF) ) has shared an announcement.

Fletcher Building Limited has released ongoing disclosure notices for Andrew Clarke and Claire Carroll, highlighting changes in their shareholdings. Andrew Clarke, a former Commercial Director, has increased his beneficial interest in the company’s ordinary shares through the vesting of award shares under Fletcher Building’s employee share plan. This disclosure is part of the company’s compliance with the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013, ensuring transparency in the trading activities of its directors and senior managers.

More about Fletcher Building Limited

Fletcher Building Limited is a prominent company based in Auckland, New Zealand, operating in the construction and building materials industry. The company is known for its diverse range of products and services, including the manufacturing and distribution of building materials, construction, and infrastructure development, with a significant market presence in New Zealand and Australia.

data.title: Tongda Hong Tai Holdings Announces Annual General Meeting and Key Resolutions
data.description:
Tongda Hong Tai Holdings Ltd ( (HK:2363) ) has provided an update.

Tongda Hong Tai Holdings Limited has announced its upcoming annual general meeting scheduled for May 8, 2025, in Hong Kong. The meeting will address several key resolutions, including the adoption of the 2024 financial statements, re-election of directors, and authorization of directors’ and auditors’ remuneration. Additionally, the company seeks approval to allot and issue shares, with specific conditions outlined for the share issuance process. This announcement signifies the company’s ongoing governance and operational planning, potentially impacting its strategic direction and shareholder engagement.

data.title: Clime Investment Management Appoints New Independent Director
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Clime Investment Management Ltd ( (AU:CIW) ).

Clime Investment Management Limited has appointed Tony Kynaston as an Independent Director, effective April 14, 2025. Kynaston, with a robust background in leadership roles at Shell and Coles Myer, brings significant expertise in stock analysis and financial management, which is expected to support Clime’s growth and strategic expansion in the investment management sector.

data.title: Wellard Ltd Approves Sale of MV Ocean Drover and Capital Return
data.description:
The latest update is out from Wellard Ltd. ( (AU:WLD) ).

Wellard Ltd has announced that its shareholders have approved the sale of the MV Ocean Drover, a livestock vessel, for US$50 million. The proceeds from this sale will be returned to shareholders at a rate of 15 cents per share. The sale is anticipated to occur in the last week of July, with the capital return expected around August 28, 2025. This decision reflects Wellard’s strategic move to optimize its asset portfolio and provide direct financial benefits to its shareholders.

More about Wellard Ltd.

Wellard Ltd operates in the livestock transportation industry, focusing on the export of live animals. The company is known for its fleet of specialized vessels designed for the safe and efficient transport of livestock across international waters.

data.title: Courage Investment Group Releases 2024 Annual Report
data.description:
An announcement from Courage Investment Group Limited ( (HK:1145) ) is now available.

Courage Investment Group Limited has announced the publication of its Annual Report for the year ended December 31, 2024. The report is available on the company’s website as well as on the Hong Kong and Singapore stock exchanges’ websites. Shareholders are encouraged to access the report online, but can request a printed version if needed. The company emphasizes the importance of shareholders providing a functional email address to receive electronic notifications of such publications.

data.title: Virco Manufacturing Reports Strong Earnings Amid 75th Anniversary
data.description:
Virco Manufacturing ( (VIRC) ) has released its Q4 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Virco Manufacturing presented to its investors.

Virco Manufacturing Corporation, a prominent player in the educational furniture sector, designs, manufactures, and supplies movable furniture and equipment primarily for educational environments across the United States. Celebrating its 75th anniversary, Virco reported strong financial results for the fiscal year ending January 31, 2025, with notable achievements in net income, operating cash flow, and shareholder returns. Despite a slight decline in annual revenue to $266 million, the company maintained a stable gross margin of 43.1% and achieved a net income of $21.6 million. Operating cash flow was robust at $33 million, supporting over $5 million in dividends and share repurchases, alongside $6 million in strategic capital expenditures. Shareholder equity saw a significant increase of 20% to $109 million. Looking ahead, Virco management remains optimistic about its long-term strategy, emphasizing continued investment in domestic manufacturing capabilities and the resilience of the educational sector. While acknowledging potential challenges such as input cost increases and funding uncertainties, the company is well-positioned to capitalize on future opportunities, leveraging its strong financial position and commitment to quality and service.

data.title: Skillsoft Corp Reports Strong Fiscal 2025 Results
data.description:
Skillsoft Corp ( (SKIL) ) has released its Q4 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Skillsoft Corp presented to its investors.

Skillsoft Corp, a leading provider of digital learning and talent management solutions, is renowned for its AI-powered platform that helps organizations and learners enhance their skills and bridge talent gaps across various industries. The company serves a global community of over 95 million learners, including 60% of the Fortune 1000.

Skillsoft Corp reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2025, showcasing a strong performance in adjusted EBITDA and free cash flow, despite a slight decline in total revenue compared to the previous year. The company also provided a positive financial outlook for fiscal 2026, emphasizing its strategic transformation initiatives.

In fiscal 2025, Skillsoft achieved a total revenue of $531 million, with its Talent Development Solutions segment seeing a slight increase in revenue to $406 million. The company reported a significant reduction in its GAAP net loss to $122 million, down from $349 million in the prior year, and maintained a stable adjusted net income of $35 million. Notably, Skillsoft’s adjusted EBITDA reached $109 million, reflecting a margin expansion to 21% of revenue.

The company’s strategic initiatives, including AI capabilities and ecosystem integrations, have shown promising early interest, with nearly 1 million launches of its AI simulator, Skillsoft CAISY™. Skillsoft’s management remains optimistic about fiscal 2026, aiming for continued margin expansion, positive free cash flow, and a return to top-line growth, despite potential macroeconomic challenges.

Looking ahead, Skillsoft is poised to capitalize on its strategic transformation and AI advancements, with a financial outlook projecting GAAP revenue between $530 million and $545 million and adjusted EBITDA ranging from $112 million to $118 million for fiscal 2026.
